name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Columbus Pawn Shop (Columbus)
description_short: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM operates a cryptocurrency cash-to-crypto kiosk at Columbus Pawn Shop, allowing customers to purchase Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies with cash during business hours.
description_long:
CoinFlip is a cryptocurrency ATM operator that has partnered with Columbus Pawn Shop to provide Bitcoin and cryptocurrency purchase services to the Columbus, Ohio area. The company specializes in cash-to-crypto transactions through self-service kiosks located in retail and convenience store locations. This particular location at 1704 Parsons Avenue operates under the Columbus Pawn Shop brand and is accessible during standard retail hours. CoinFlip has expanded its network across multiple states with dozens of ATM locations, positioning itself as a convenient entry point for consumers interested in purchasing cryptocurrency without requiring a traditional crypto exchange account setup.

CoinFlip's primary service offering is facilitating the purchase of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies using cash. The company also supports the opposite direction—customers can sell cryptocurrency for cash at select locations. To streamline the transaction process, CoinFlip offers a dedicated crypto wallet app (CoinFlip Crypto Wallet) that customers should download before visiting an ATM. The company provides a CoinFlip Account sign-up feature that allows customers to save time during transactions and access higher daily transaction limits, up to $15,000 per day (with limits varying by location). Customer support is available 24/7 through phone and email channels.

What distinguishes this ATM location is its integration within an established pawn shop, potentially appealing to customers who already frequent that retail environment. The kiosk offers same-day cryptocurrency purchases with cash—a significant convenience factor compared to traditional exchange platforms that require bank account linkage, identity verification delays, or waiting periods. The location operates extended hours (9 AM to 6 PM most days, 9 AM to 5 PM Sunday), making it accessible to working adults. CoinFlip's 24/7 customer support and account features with transaction limits of up to $15,000 daily suggest the service is designed for both casual users and more frequent traders.

The primary caveat is that this is a cryptocurrency transaction service, not a traditional financial service. Bitcoin ATMs typically charge higher fees than exchange platforms, though CoinFlip's specific fee structure is not detailed on the location page. Users must bring valid identification and may face regulatory compliance checks. The cryptocurrency market is volatile and unregulated, meaning purchases carry significant investment risk. Additionally, transaction limits, fees, and available cryptocurrencies may vary by location, requiring customers to verify specifics before visiting.
pros: Cash-to-crypto transactions completed same-day without bank account linkage required
Extended store hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays, 9 AM–5 PM Sunday) with 24/7 customer support available
CoinFlip Account feature allows daily transaction limits up to $15,000 and faster repeat visits
Dedicated mobile wallet app (CoinFlip Crypto Wallet) simplifies transaction preparation
Located within established Columbus Pawn Shop, a familiar retail destination
Bi-directional service—ability to both buy Bitcoin and sell for cash at select locations
Multiple cryptocurrencies available (beyond Bitcoin), providing portfolio diversification options
cons: Bitcoin ATMs typically charge significantly higher fees than traditional crypto exchanges, though specific rates not disclosed on this page
Transaction limits and available cryptocurrencies may vary by location, requiring verification before visiting
Cryptocurrency purchases carry high volatility and investment risk; unregulated market with no consumer protection guarantees
Requires valid identification and may involve regulatory compliance checks that delay transactions
No mention of buy-back guarantees, price locks, or consumer dispute resolution mechanisms
best_for: Consumers seeking quick cash-to-Bitcoin conversions without opening traditional crypto exchange accounts
First-time cryptocurrency buyers comfortable with higher fees in exchange for immediate accessibility
Existing Columbus Pawn Shop customers interested in diversifying transactions at a familiar location
Unbanked or underbanked individuals with cash but no traditional bank account for exchange sign-ups
diagnosis: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM at Columbus Pawn Shop is best for unbanked consumers, first-time crypto buyers, or anyone needing immediate cash-to-Bitcoin conversion without opening an exchange account. The primary caveat is that Bitcoin ATMs charge higher fees than traditional exchanges, cryptocurrency carries substantial volatility and regulatory risk, and this service should be viewed as a convenience premium rather than an investment platform.
services: CoinFlip Crypto Wallet download and setup
Daily transaction limits up to $15,000 (with variation by location)
24/7 customer support via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email (support@coinflip.tech)
Receipt generation and transaction history access
Location-finder service for nearby CoinFlip ATM network
